title: FINGOOO 20 pieces Christmas Black Gel Pen, Ink Rollerball Ball Point Pens Assorted Reindeer Santa Xmas Tree Bell Snowmen Novelty Pens School Gifts Party Bag Fillers for Kids Students
features: CHRISTMAS THEME GEL PENS- This comprehensive set includes 24 high-quality gel pens featuring five distinct festive designs, with four pens of each charming character style providing ample quantity for classroom sharing, party favours, or seasonal gift-giving.

CUTE CHRISTMAS DEGISN- Each pen showcases an adorable rubber figurine atop the cap depicting reindeer, snowmen, jingle bells, Christmas trees, and Santa Claus, perfectly colour-coordinated with the pen barrel to create a visually harmonious and festive writing instrument.

DIMENSIONS- Measuring 18cm in length, these pens offer comfortable proportions for both children's hands and adult use, making them equally suitable for schoolwork, holiday card writing, or decorative display in pen pots and stationery collections.

MATERIAL- Crafted from durable, non-toxic ABS plastic with smooth-writing gel ink cartridges, these pens maintain consistent ink flow while the secure rubber figurines withstand regular use without detaching, ensuring long-lasting enjoyment.

APPLICATIONS- Ideal as Christmas gifts for students, teacher appreciation presents, party bag fillers, or seasonal office supplies, these novelty pens combine practical writing function with holiday cheer, making writing tasks during the festive period genuinely enjoyable.
description: Product Description FINGOOO 20 pieces Christmas Black Gel Pen Set Details Styles 20 gel pens in pack, 5 styles and 4 pens in each style, include snowman, reindeer, Xmas tree, Xmas bell, Santa Ideal gift Ideal gift for kids who are student or leaning writing, drawing and so on, they will remember the warm moment once they write or draw with these pens Bring you happniess Write your greetings in the cards with these cute pens with your children, enjoy your warm family time this Christmas! Wish you have joy with these cute Xmas theme gel pens!
